nodes.label: Square310x310Logo.png – Dragit App Icon (310×310)
nodes.description: Windows Square310x310Logo tile icon for the Dragit application. Design features a stylized letter 'D' composed of a thick purple/blue arc forming the curved spine, two blue filled circles at the top-left and bottom-left endpoints of the arc (representing drag handles or nodes), and a pink/red rounded rectangle with a smaller pink circle on top centered vertically — together evoking a drag-and-drop interaction metaphor. Background is white. Color palette: medium blue-purple (#6366c8 range) for arc and circles, coral/salmon pink (#d9606a range) for the central handle element.
